titleStmt.title: SII 26.366: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 366. (A.R. No. 345 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of 36 Naṟpaḻaṅkāśu for burning a nandā lamp in the temple of Tiruviṟkōlamuḍaiyār in Kūvam alias Tiyāgasamudranallūr in Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, by a certain Kavuśikan Kākkunāyakka-bhaṭṭan of Tiruvīḻimiḻalai. The temple Śivabrāhmaṇas Kauśikaṉ Dēvappiḷḷai, Gautaman Uḍaiyappiḷḷai, his younger brothers, viz. Gautaman Śōma-bhaṭṭan and Gautaman Tiruvalamuḍaiyān-bhaṭṭan and Kāśyapan Dēvappiḷḷai who received the gift of money had agreed to burn the lamp from the month of Chittirai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉṉuṭaittāka tripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 munṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu maṇa
viṟkoṭṭattuk kūvamāna tiyākacamuttiranallūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruviṟkolamuṭaiyārkku tiruviḻimiḻalaik kavucikan kākkunāyakka bhaṭṭar pakkal Ikkoyil civa- brā
hmaṇaril kaucikaṉ tevappiḷḷaiyum gautaman Uṭaiyapiḷḷaiyum En tampimārum gautaman comabhaṭṭanum gautaman tiruvalamuṭaiyān bhaṭṭanum kāśyapan
tevappiḷḷaiyum Ivaṉaivom Igaucikan kākkunāyakabhaṭṭan pakkal Ivvāṇṭu cittirai māsa mutal poliyūṭṭāka nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa naṟpaḻaṅkācu 10 6 patiṉāṟu
ṅkaikkoṇṭu 1 Oru tirunantāviḷakku cantirātittavarai celuttak kaṭavomāṉom Ivvaṉaivom Ippaṭikku Ivai gaucikan tevappiḷḷai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
gautaman Uṭaiyapiḷḷai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai gautaman comabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu§ Ippaṭikku Ivai gautaman tiruvalamuṭaiyān bhaṭṭan Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai kāśyapa
n tevappiḷḷai Eḻuttu § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ikkoyil pāracavan maṟ n Eḻuttu śrīmāheśvara rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.366 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
